headline: Tech's worst week in a year — AI momentum cracks
detail: Broad doubt about AI monetization and capex sustainability hammered tech names this week. Your entire book is 90% concentrated here, so this is a direct portfolio-wide headwind with no diversification cushion.

headline: Oracle worst week since dot-com bust on AI financing fears
detail: Oracle's collapse signals the market is starting to punish companies seen as over-investing in AI without clear returns. This same narrative overhangs AVGO and PLTR, both already on SELL with significant losses in your book.

headline: U.S. strikes Iran — oil spikes in after-hours
detail: Geopolitical escalation pushes oil higher and triggers broad risk-off moves, which historically rotate money out of high-multiple tech names. Your margin exposure means a gap-down open would hit harder than it reads on paper.

headline: SpaceX bonds flashing warning signs amid AI frenzy pullback
detail: Investors are pumping the brakes on SpaceX debt just as you've initiated both SPCX and SPAL. SPCX is a brand-new IPO with limited price discovery, and SPAL is a leveraged ETF that decays — both are vulnerable if SpaceX sentiment sours further.
